subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have named thee the Trusted One of Utterance amidst the concourse of creation, that thou mayest glory in the favors of thy Lord, the All-Merciful. Indeed, thy Lord is the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا سمیناک امین البیان بین ملا الاکوان لتفتخر بعنایه ربک الرحمن ان ربک لهو الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
